summary:
CHURCH EXPERIENCE AND HEALING VISIONS: Brandon recounts attending a Sunday service at Glorious Church Fellowship featuring guest speaker Mark Hankins. During the service, Brandon states he saw an open heaven with Jesus and a cloud of witnesses observing the congregation. He describes a subsequent vision of a C-17 military cargo plane dropping packages that represented healings and miracles. Brandon specifies that creative miracles, including healings for autoimmune diseases and fibromyalgia, are actively occurring and encourages individuals to believe for immediate manifestations of physical and financial turnarounds.

POLITICAL PROPHECIES AND THE COVERED WAGON DREAM: Brandon shares details from a phone conversation with Chris Reed, which led him to review Dana Coverstone's prophetic dream about a covered wagon. Brandon links this dream — featuring Kamala Harris on a wagon, Joe Biden falling off a donkey, and Hillary Clinton holding a moldy key — to current political events. Brandon reiterates his own past claims of foreseeing Joe Biden's removal and Kamala Harris stepping in. Furthermore, Brandon urges vigilance regarding Michelle Obama and Gavin Newsom, suggesting they may form a future political ticket, and emphasizes the need for continued spiritual warfare against demonic forces rather than human adversaries.

IMPENDING STORMS AND DISASTER WARNINGS: Brandon connects Coverstone's vision of a blinding flash leaving the East Coast dazed and seeking shelter to his own repeated warnings of an approaching storm. He claims to have accurately predicted an October surprise, initially thought to be for America but later identified as the Sabbath attack on Israel. Brandon also issues a severe warning about a coming plague that could potentially kill 350 million people, though he asserts that this disaster can be lessened or stopped entirely through the intercession and faith of believers, comparing this spiritual authority to Abraham pleading for Sodom and Gomorrah.

SPIRITUAL DECREES AND FUTURE DECLARATIONS: Brandon issues a series of declarations aimed at spiritual and physical deliverance, including freedom from addictions such as pornography, drugs, alcohol, and gambling, as well as relief from mental torment and demonic dreams. He claims spiritual authority to stop the aforementioned plague and declares protection over the upcoming Olympics against any terrorist activity or hidden plots. Additionally, Brandon decrees that a godly person will occupy the White House in 2024 and that an impending 2025 financial market crash, which he states would be worse than the Great Depression, will be delayed or averted through collective repentance.
rawData: [July 23, 2024]-[The Lord spoke to me about Dana Coverstone wagon dream from three years ago - could it be time now]-[https://youtu.be/J1SsxvRRu_c]-[Hey, good morning, family. How are y'all doing today? I have some things on my heart to share with you. First off, I just want to say thank you for all your support. God bless you all. Thank you from the bottom of our hearts; we just want to say thank you for all the beautiful things that you all have said. You know, there are a lot of good emails. I've had over 70,000 emails in the last week, and it's a little overwhelming for us. If I seem cranky in the comment section or anything, I apologize. I have been bombarded by a lot. We're doing the best we can, but it doesn't give me the right to be cranky sometimes. I just want to say forgive me if I have been. There's a lot of the world on here, and there are a lot of people that are very hateful and very rude to us. God bless you all, the ones that are rude; we pray for you. We truly do. The Lord tells me, 'You've got to walk in love,' and I'm like, 'Wow.' Like I said, if they turn the channel off tomorrow, you can find me on our other YouTube channel. If you want to subscribe to that, it's Come Thrift with Me. We did it because my wife likes to thrift, and we like to flip things on eBay and Poshmark and other platforms like that, like Facebook Marketplace or whatever we can do—that's how we make our living. We've been doing it for like 11 years now, and God's been faithful. We've built a good business out of it. A lot of people go, 'Well, are you doing YouTube for that?' No, I do YouTube because God called me to. My business and what I do for a living is Poshmark and eBay. I've been doing that for a long time, and God has been faithful. So, if you want to follow us on our Come Thrift with Me channel, it'll be a blessing. If anything happens and they shut this down—which I don't know if they will or not—but okay. First off, I just want to tell you all what happened at church on Sunday. I was standing in the back like I always do, and I was praying during the service. The service was outstanding. By the way, we had a special guest speaker there: Mark Hankins was there. Powerful man of God, moves in the gifts of the Spirit with signs and wonders, and it was awesome. You all can go on his archives and watch the service on Sunday night and it will bless you at the Glorious Church Fellowship, I believe, YouTube channel. It might be there. You can watch it if you want to help support it. It's amazing; it would bless your life. Mark Hankins was there Sunday morning and Sunday night. So I was standing in the back praying like I always do, and all of a sudden the Lord opened my eyes in the realm of the spirit and I saw an open heaven over that congregation. I saw the Lord Jesus sitting up there, and He was watching the service. I could see the great cloud of witnesses watching. I could see them; they were peeking out over this portal over the church and they were watching. Oh my gosh, the presence of the Lord was so strong. I just sat in the back and wept because I could feel the presence of the Holy Spirit. I'm telling you, if you're dry, if you're thirsty, what a place to go. Then all of a sudden, the Lord showed me a C-17. It's one of the big army planes. It's a C-17, I believe, is what it is—one of those big planes that hold all of the major military stuff. All of a sudden, that plane—I believe it's a C-17—I saw the plane swoop in and start dropping stuff out of the back of this plane in the spirit. Healings, anything that you've been believing for, the Lord said He's bringing it. Do not lose faith in believing for your miracle. Believe that all things are possible to him that believes. We are in the last of the last seconds before the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. People say, 'Oh, I've heard that all my life.' I'm trying to warn you that Jesus is coming. Even like people say, 'Well, you say that it's been a year or two years, whatever,' on the scope of time, we're talking thousands of years, folks. If it's 10 years, that's nothing. How fast does a year go now? It's like a snap of a finger. We're already almost going into the last half of the year. We have August, September, October, November, December, and then 2024 is done. Look how fast. I don't know if the year went by fast for you all, but it went by very fast for me so far. So, I'm telling you, time is accelerating and we are on the verge of a major outpouring. I'm telling you, I believe with all my heart that we're going to have a great harvest of souls. I'm believing for a billion-soul harvest into the kingdom of God. A great harvest of God's people coming into the kingdom. So back to the vision: I saw that big plane dropping all those packages and things that people were believing for—demonstrations and manifestations of His glory all over the people. And I'm telling you, He told me creative miracles are happening right now in this atmosphere. He said, 'Brandon, people that have autoimmune disease are being healed right now.' I could see it. And the Lord told me autoimmune disease is being healed; I saw fibromyalgia being healed last night. I want to encourage people that God is going to meet you right where you are. If you're believing for your miracle, if you're believing for a touch for your finances or whatever, I believe today is your day for your great turnaround. I believe today is your day for your miracle of your healing. If the symptoms started with pain or whatever, why can't the beginning of your miracle start with the absence of the pain, the discomfort, or the poverty being gone? It could change just like that. Just as the symptoms came on, they're gone. That's what's going to happen. I'm telling you, it's going to be a turnaround. And I believe with all my heart, faith calls those things that be not as though they were. And it's your time for your manifestation. God is no respecter of persons, and what He'll do for one, He'll do for another. It just takes faith, and you just got to reach out by faith and grab on to what the Lord has for you. Number two of what I felt in my heart to tell you all: I was praying, not last night, but Saturday night. Saturday night I got a call from Chris Reed. Amazing man of God, one of the most humble people I've ever talked to on the phone. I promise y'all, and I don't say that flippantly because I'm not trying to name-drop. This guy is a genuine man of God; he loves the Lord, and it was an honor to be able to talk to somebody like him. So, I was on the phone with him and I was praying. We prayed together; he said he was praying for me and just wanted to let me know he was lifting me up in prayer. Well, I got off the phone with him and I was sitting there interceding, and the Lord downloaded to me. He said, 'Brandon, I want you to go back to Dana Coverstone's prophetic word—his dream that he had about the covered wagon.' I went back and listened to it immediately when the Lord spoke to me, and I started listening to everything he was saying in that dream about the covered wagon, the rocking of it, and Kamala Harris on the wagon and Joe Biden being on the donkey behind her. They were hitting the donkey and Joe Biden fell off. It didn't make it sound like he went home; the way it sounded to me was... Hillary came up beside her, and she had a thing on Trump's neck with a big key on it, with mold on it and everything. Go listen to that prophetic dream; I believe that was four years off. I believe we're seeing it manifest right now. Go listen to it. It's going to freak you all out because, as I said, if it doesn't happen within that time frame, everyone says, "Oh, he's a false prophet. Dana Coverstone's weird." No, go back and listen to it. God's timing is perfect. We all thought there were a lot of people that gave words about 2020 that said Trump was going to be in office. When the Lord told me, "Brandon, he's not going to be president in 2020," I had so much hate from people. In fact, I had friends who didn't want to talk to me anymore. They got really mad at me and said, "You're missing it. You're not hearing God." And I said, "The Lord spoke to me and told me that this is not going to manifest, that Joe Biden will run the country for the timeframe." And then I saw him being removed and that Kamala Harris would step in. Some people say, "Well, he wasn't removed all the way. He's still in office." They don't even know where he's at right now. Maybe at this time in this video, they said he falsified the signature on the document, and they underlined it, saying the signatures don't match up, saying that it's not even him that signed the piece of paper, saying that he wasn't going to run anymore. There are a lot of conspiracies out there right now. So I'm just like, what's really going on? Because I told you all, and this is what I think is interesting: I told you all to watch Michelle, to watch Gavin. I've warned you. I don't know how many times I've seen Michelle Obama and Gavin. Hillary is who I thought. I said, "I saw a woman with short, sandy blonde hair. It was right in here on her head, and the Lord blotted her face. He would not allow me to see that." Why? I have no idea. This is what the Lord did. And I saw them hit her going beside Kamala Harris going clear up into January. So, I see in part. This is just me adding my intellect to this word right now. I told you exactly what I saw, but this is just me thinking now. Don't say, "Well, you said this." No, just listen to me. What if Kamala Harris is with Hillary? Because Hillary came out immediately with Bill and endorsed Kamala Harris. Then Joe—from what I understand, people are telling me that Barack Obama said, "No, not so fast. This has to be voted on at the Democratic caucus." Well, if she ends up taking it—if she doesn't take it and they don't get her in—is he planning to do something with Kamala? Is he planning to do something with Michelle and maybe Gavin in the future? I don't know. But I've told you all I've prayed over that for over two years now, that I saw her running with Gavin. They were a force to be reckoned with. People go, "Well, it's a shoo-in." No. If Michelle and Gavin go, it is. We've got to pray. It's like some people say, "Well, we've got a little bit of victory here, and we can see the finish line." It's like the tortoise and the hare. The hare goes, "Man, I've got this race," and he goes over there and he lays down and takes a nap because he thinks he can beat that tortoise. And the tortoise is going, "I think I can. I think I can." He's tripping over himself and he's falling, and the hare is over there sleeping. All of a sudden, the tortoise gets ahead of the hare, and the whole story everyone knows: the tortoise wins and the hare loses because he got overconfident in his ability to win. Do not let your guard down spiritually just because you think we have won. We have got to take the enemy camp seriously. And I'm not calling the Democrats the enemy; I'm talking about the principalities and powers and the rulers over the darkness and spiritual wickedness in high places. We wrestle not against flesh and blood, ladies and gentlemen, but against those things. The Bible's told us that. So, I never label a human being as an enemy, ever. But I'm talking about the demonic forces right now. That's what I'm trying to say. Never let your guard down on your enemy, ever. That's the devil. He has a plan to kill, steal, and destroy. But the Bible says that Jesus came that we might have life and life more abundantly. I'm just saying a lot of the theologies line up with the dark side. And I'm not saying all the Republican side is always light, but they have a tendency to sway good. Never stop and be the hare laying down so the tortoise can win. Even when we have the upper hand spiritually and we see that victory finish line, don't let your guard down. I always say—this is going to be a gross illustration—but it's like an old dead dog in the road. You keep running it over until it's a greasy spot. You've got to keep going over it. That's probably a gross illustration, but you keep hitting that devil until he's a greasy spot. Don't give up when you see the first blade of your miracle. You need the blade, then the ear, then the full manifestation of the whole fruit of the corn. Do not give up on this. It's time for us to put our shields up even stronger and stand up even greater than what we ever had before, believing for a turnaround of our nation, to believe for things to get better and not worse. It's time to believe even greater. Put the big boys up on the front line of that football team. It's time to put the great defensive backs up there going, "Hey, we're going to stop the run, and they're not going to get the touchdown." That's what you've got to do. I probably kicked that too much, but that's why I just feel in my spirit to tell you all it's not time to stop. It's not time to give up. It's time to press. I warned you about that. So go watch that video of that covered wagon dream that he had. It will bless you. It's going to make you go, "Oh my gosh, look at where we are." But look at what he says afterward. After the election, there was a flash. And he talked about this. He said, "I saw a flash, and everybody was dazed and confused." He warned everybody. He said everybody was dazed and confused, and everybody was on the East Coast—they were all in like cots, and they were all trying to find shelter and food and all kinds of stuff. What happens? I'm telling you all, the Lord has warned me there's a storm coming. I've told you all countless times the Lord has warned me there's a storm coming. What is Dana Coverstone? He doesn't directly say it, but he's kind of insinuating something. I saw the short-haired blonde-headed lady. So that's a little recap. I saw the short blonde-headed lady with Kamala Harris. So if we see all this stuff panning out, it looks like that vision, everything I saw again. It looks like I hit it right on the head. Let's just see. We'll see how it pans out. They're all going and they're happening almost like dominoes. Everything that the Lord showed me about Joe Biden being removed, I warned you all was coming and it happened. I said he will not even be running. It will not happen. I told you this last year, 2023. I warned you in September of 2023. I told you this was coming. I thought it was coming in November of 2023. So, I was seeing in the future what the Lord was telling me was coming, but I thought that it was coming that year. But no, it's almost a whole year later from what I saw in the spirit. I thought this was imminent. That's why I thought it was imminent; I felt it inside. This is what's going to happen this month, this next month. I even told my son, "We're going to have an October surprise." Well, we did have an October surprise for Israel. It was what the Lord was showing me. I prayed over it and the Lord told me there's going to be a serious event take place. I thought it was about America, but I was interceding for Israel and what happened on the Sabbath. It was a tragic thing that happened for all those people that were dragged and murdered and everything. It was terrible. I was interceding for that. But like I said, it's growing in your gifting; it's growing in what God's called you to do. I'm not perfect. I'm learning just like you all. I'm learning how to flow in the gift that God has given me. It takes practice. It takes time. It takes maturity. And it's a day-to-day process. Just like how a baby learns to walk and pull itself up and crawl and walk and then run and fall. They keep falling. You learn. That's how you learn spiritually. You just keep picking yourself up. You learn. And that's how we process things. So, like I said, this is how I've learned over the course of the years I've done things. I just want to encourage you all that good days are happening for the body of Christ. Good days are happening for the people who will believe him for miracles, signs, and wonders in these last days. This is not a time to bury our head in the sand like an ostrich and say, "Well, I don't want to know anything more that's coming." I try to warn you of these things. They said, "What are you telling us all this stuff for? We don't want to hear about the plague that's going to kill 350 million people," because I believe we can lessen it. I believe we can maybe even stop it altogether. I warned you all that we have power and authority. If the Lord would have mercy on Sodom and Gomorrah for ten righteous people, and he said he would spare the city. He would spare them. When Abraham was interceding for that city, how much more with a new covenant with his son that we have as believers? If there's 50,000 righteous in this nation in America or all around the world asking God for him to step in and intervene, how much more would Jesus want to do it for us as blood-washed, born-again children of the most high God? How much more would he want to step in for us if he would do it for Abraham and he called him a friend of God? And Abraham staggered not at the promise of God through unbelief, but was strong in faith, giving glory to God, being fully persuaded that what he had been promised, he was able also to perform it. Ladies and gentlemen, we have to be fully persuaded that God is a God of abundance. God is a healer. God is a God of love. We have to be fully persuaded. But he brings things and he wants you to intercede on behalf of America. What did Jesus tell me when I had the visitation? He said, "Brandon, who will stand in the gap for America? Who will intercede for America for what's coming?" I told you, ladies and gentlemen, there is a great storm. Sobering days are coming. But I believe as believers, we have power and authority to tread on serpents and scorpions, and nothing shall by any means hurt us. I believe with all my heart that we can speak to the mountain and tell it to be removed and be thou cast in the sea if we shall not doubt in our hearts. I believe you shall have whatsoever things you say because faith comes by hearing and hearing by the word of God. And as you get that word down inside of you and renew your mind every day, life and death is in the power of your tongue. And what you say out of your mouth, you're going to start living tomorrow. What you said out of your mouth yesterday, you're living today. I'm telling you, the fruit of what you say is what you're going to start living because that's what the Bible says. Life and death is in the power of the tongue. You're going to start living it. Ladies and gentlemen, if you start speaking blessing over your life instead of curses, you're going to start living a blessed life. I believe it. An abundant life, an overflow life, a life full of prosperity and health and healing and wellness for your family. But you start cursing your husband and you say, "Oh, he's a no-good so-and-so. Oh, my kids are lazy. They don't ever do nothing." You're going to get the manifestation of it because you will have what you say. The Bible tells us that you will have what you say. Say something good over your life today, for life and death is in the power of your tongue. So, I want to tell you all this. Let's believe today that God is turning things around and we will not see a financial crash crisis. It may try to come out and do something, but we can stop it and lessen it. We can stop it and the plague. He's warning; the watchman's on the wall. "Hello. Hello. Look ahead." And I'm yelling down on the wall, "Hello. Hello everybody. Hey, I'm seeing this in the horizon. Pray and obey." Humble yourself before the mighty hand of God and he will exalt you in due time. He said, "If my people will humble themselves and pray and turn from their wicked ways..." Come on, folks. If we turn from our wicked ways, he said he would heal our land. He told us we would hear from heaven and he would heal our land. He promised us this. So, how much more do the righteous—we are his children—how much more do we have authority with the new covenant with his son's blood, have authority to speak to the mountain in your circumstances to change? How much more is it that we're not supposed to walk in fear and be tormented by anything? We're supposed to be the head and not the tail, above and not beneath. We'll go through and not go under. Greater is he that is in you than he that is in the world. We're not supposed to be busted and disgusted, broke, dying, sick, lame, weak, all of it. Jesus paid the price for you to live in victory. But I'm trying to tell you until Adam's lease is up—it usually will be at the 6,000 years—when it's a full 6,000 years and we get ready to go into the 7,000 years for the millennial reign, we still have to pray and believe because Adam committed high treason and he gave the stuff over to the devil. And the Bible says in Corinthians that Satan is the god of this world. We have to take our authority and we're sealed with him. And that's why we have to pray. We have to use our faith because of what Adam did committing high treason. He lost it. And Jesus came back and got it and took death, hell, and the keys from him. And now he gave us to be joint heirs with him. We're joint heirs with Jesus Christ. But Adam's lease is not up yet. Adam's lease is not up yet. The devil's still running over the world. And so we have to use our authority as we're here. If you just read the book of Ephesians over and over and over and over again, you're going to understand who you are in Christ, and pray Ephesians over your mind that the eyes of your understanding would be enlightened. And I'm telling you, I pray that over my mind all the time: 'Let the eyes of my understanding be enlightened.' So I just want to encourage you all today. I'm trying to stir you up to believe the impossible. Believe for the impossible. Believe for it today. Believe that God can do all things, and nothing is impossible to him that believes. All things are possible to him who will believe. Believe that today. All things. But don't just say, 'I believe God can do it for Bobby, Joe, Jeff, whoever.' Believe that God can do it for you. Do you believe Jesus can do it for you? Do you believe Jesus can heal you today? You may believe that he can heal somebody else, but do you believe he wants to heal you? Today is your day. You need to think about you. It's time for you to be a little bit selfish about this. Say, 'No, it's my time. I believe that Jesus wants to heal me. I'm holding on to the miracle for me. I'm going to get my miracle today.' You can believe for other people, but I'm just saying sometimes you have to say, 'Hey, it's about me, too.' God, Jesus, Son of David, have mercy on me! Blind Bartimaeus—he was out there saying that. He was a bulldog that day. Think about what he did. He reached up there and grabbed the hem of it. He was like, 'Hey, Jesus, Son of David, have mercy on me.' He's reaching out: 'I'm a beggar. I need help.' He realized that he needed a miracle. How much more does Jesus want to do that for you? He's no respecter of persons. If he did it for blind Bartimaeus, how much more will he do it for you? Jesus wants to heal you today. So, let's believe for your miracle. It's time. We don't have to believe; we get to. He wants to do something. It's like we don't have to give; we get to give. We get to give to the church. We get to help out ministries because Jesus was good to us. So we help out the church. We help out people who are preaching the gospel. That's what we get to do. We don't have to. So, and that's why I just want to encourage you all. And first off, I want to say this: People want to say, 'Who are you? Are you a prophet? Are you a pastor? Are you whatever?' I'm none of the above. In my heart, I'm going to tell you, ladies and gentlemen, I've never placed myself in any prophet role. I'm not a self-pronounced prophet. People want to call me that; you can call me whatever you want to. People call me a lot of bad things, but if they want to call me a prophet, whatever. I'm not going to sit there and rebut it and say, 'You're wrong. I'm not a prophet.' I don't know. God's called me to come on here and tell you that he's coming. I'm not going to self-proclaim. I'm not a pastor. I don't have a church. I just talk to you on YouTube. I tell you what Jesus told me to tell you. I'm telling you I have a personal relationship with him and he's my friend. I have had nine visitations, including the one I just had, of him visiting me and telling me things. People say, 'You're smoking something.' No, I have a relationship with Jesus. And you can have one with him, too. Do you want one with him? Do you want Jesus to come visit you? He'll come and visit you. If you just have the faith of a mustard seed, he said he'll move a mountain. If you have childlike faith—go to him not as an adult. We're his children. He didn't say you're God's little adults; you're God's little children. So go to him as a child. Father, right now in the name of Jesus, there are so many people that watch these videos that have needs. And Father, you said in your word that you supply all our needs according to your riches and glory by Christ Jesus. And I call them healed and whole and well in the name of Jesus. I speak life over their bodies, over their cells, over their brains, over their minds, and their wills and emotions. We plead the blood of Jesus over every single one of them. And we say, 'Satan, thus far and no further; you have crossed the bloodline.' And we will not stand for it anymore. We call healing and wholeness and wellness over our bodies from the top of our head to the soles of our feet. Jesus Christ has paid the price for us to walk in victory. And I thank you, Lord, that you said in your word that by your stripes we are healed. I thank you, Father, that you said that you took our poverty. You took all of our lack, everything. You became poor that we might be rich. I thank you, Lord, that we are no longer broke, busted, and disgusted. Father, you said, 'Give, and it shall be given unto us: good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over shall men give unto our bosom.' I thank you, Father, that you said you'd provide for us. Now, Father, I call that money in right now in Jesus' name. From the north, the south, the east, the west, we call for finances for our household. We call it in, that Father, you are bringing it in right now with creative ideas to get wealth. I thank you, Father, right now that our angels are bringing forth favor. We have favor and the angels are bringing forth the money. I thank you, Father, right now in Jesus' name. We call deliverance over all kinds of addictions today, Father—from pornography to drugs to alcohol to gambling to whatever. I call them delivered right now in Jesus' name from major addictions, things that have been long strongholds on their lives. I thank you, Lord, that they are free, for whom the Son has set free is free indeed. And I call them free from the bondage of gambling. I thank you, Lord, that they're free from pornography. I thank you they're free from drugs and alcohol. Lord, we call them delivered in Jesus' name. Now, Father, I thank you, Lord, that you said that they have the mind of Christ according to 2 Timothy 1:7, that God has not given them a spirit of fear, but of power and of love and of a well-balanced mind. And I speak balance over their minds right now. I rebuke demonic dreams and torment in their sleep. We plead the blood of Jesus over them from the top of their head to the soles of their feet. And I thank you, Father, that we have power and authority over this. And we will not be tormented anymore. Father, I thank you, Lord, right now in Jesus' name. Completely free, completely covered by the blood. They will not be tormented by anything. Father, I thank you, Lord, that you freed them. I thank you, Lord, that your blood covers them. I thank you, Lord Father, that you set them free, that you've delivered them from all kinds of disease, all kinds of bondage—that we're not under the curse anymore. According to Deuteronomy 28, Galatians says, 'Christ has redeemed us from the curse of the law.' And I give you praise and glory and honor for it in the name of Jesus. And I thank you, the best is yet to come. I call marriages restored. I call marriages to be whole and healed. Strife in marriages to be broken off in Jesus' name, and peace to flow in those homes. That their children that are wayward would come home. Father, the children that are sick and dying and broken and hurt—Father, I thank you, Lord, that they're restored in Jesus' name. And we thank you, Father, that your son is coming quickly. And Father, I thank you, Lord, that there will be no plague of the 350 million. We take authority over this demonic attack that you have warned me of as a watchman on the wall, telling me that these things were coming. Father, we use our faith right now to stop this storm from coming. We say, 'Storm, cease and be still in your maneuvering. Cease and be still.' Father, I thank you, Lord, that we have authority over the storm of plagues and pestilence, over terrorist activity. We plead the blood over the Olympics. Father, we thank you, Lord, that there will be no weapon formed against any of those people that will prosper. We plead the blood of Jesus over the Olympics, Father. And we thank you, Lord, that there is a great covering over every single person who is there. Father, they may not even know you, but you put angels around them, Father, and that they would know you.
